title: Enhanced Effects
description:
This mod aims to enhance the uses of potions by adding useful recipes such as poisoned food
It also add a non-lingering potion tipped arrow recipe
body:
Enhanced Effects adds usefuls crafting recipes using potions

#### Effect Catalyst
A new item used in most of the mod recipes
#### Poisoned Food
The player can now poison any food with a potion. When this food is eaten, the potion effect is applied (if the food already has effects you will have to add an **Effect Catalyst** to the crafting grid)
#### Potion Merging
You can now take any potions you want as well as an **Effect Catalyst** and a glass bottle to create a new potion from the ones in the crafting grid
#### Effect Extraction
You can now extract effects from foods by putting them with a glass bottle in the crafting grid. This will give you a custom potion containing the effects of the food. You can get the splash and the lingering variants by adding a gunpowder or dragon breath to the crafting grid
#### Tipped Arrows
You can now craft tipped arrows from splash potions and regular potions
